title: TransDigm (TDG)Intrinsic Value
description: We ran a full discounted cash flow on TransDigm using FY2024 actuals. One number. Every assumption disclosed. Here's what TDG is really worth.

fcfGrowth.title: FCF Growth Rate (Y1-Y5)
fcfGrowth.rationale:
" data-astro-cid-57ovlnyb>
TransDigm has historically grown FCF at robust double-digit rates, fueled by a recovering commercial aerospace market and aggressive pricing on monopolistic aftermarket parts. 12% is a conservative estimate for continued strong execution and opportunistic bolt-on acquisitions.

discountRate.title: Discount Rate (WACC)
discountRate.rationale:
" data-astro-cid-57ovlnyb>
TransDigm has historically grown FCF at robust double-digit rates, fueled by a recovering commercial aerospace market and aggressive pricing on monopolistic aftermarket parts. 12% is a conservative estimate for continued strong execution and opportunistic bolt-on acquisitions.

terminalGrowth.title: Terminal Growth Rate
terminalGrowth.rationale:
" data-astro-cid-57ovlnyb>
Air travel and defense spending have proven to be incredibly durable over decades. A 3.5% terminal growth rate assumes TransDigm will continue to capture a growing share of global GDP as airplanes require continuous maintenance and component replacement indefinitely.

verdictFooter: Based on FY2025 actuals. Data via S&P Global (Mar 18, 2026).

faq.question: Why is the DCF value so much lower than the market price?
faq.answer: Westmount Research. "TransDigm (TDG) Intrinsic Value: A DCF Analysis." westmountfundamentals.com, May 18, 2024.
